content_body:
We ran away . . . escaped! Away from all the craziness of our fast-paced lives to Echoes by the Lake. What a great place to run to! Nature all around to re-energize ourselves. Love, love, LOVE the view! House is set up beautifully. Thank you!

Almost . . . almost hated to have such a large space for just the two of us, but it was fun. Appreciated the craftsmanship of the home. It's a perfect place to "bunker down" and rejuvenate one's spirit and soul.
title: LOVE the View!
